Patch Set 1: Code-Review-2

There have been a number of discussions recently around the adoption of Service Mesh in ONAP. At TSC, Architecture and PTL meetings there has been a push towards providing support to enable/disable AAF integration from a global configuration value. Please take a look at https://jira.onap.org/browse/OOM-1986 for more details. We would like to ensure this is in place for all AAF integrations so Operators that choose to use SM instead of AAF, can disable the integration with AAF.
